company_type: Commercial and Residential Real Estate Information, Analytics, and Online Marketplaces

supply_chain.dependencies: Majority of computing runs on AWS and ACC cloud infrastructure platforms. Reliance on third-party data sources, MLSs for residential listings, and third-party service providers for IT infrastructure, payment processing, and data feeds.
supply_chain.risks: Disruption of AWS or ACC would negatively impact operations. Loss of relationships with MLSs or third-party listing providers could limit listing data quality. Dependence on third-party payment processors for credit/debit card transactions. Reliance on third-party data feeds and public records providers.

regulatory_risks: Privacy and data protection laws (GDPR, CCPA, evolving state and federal privacy laws)
Consumer protection laws enforced by FTC and state Attorneys General
Payment card industry security standards and PCI compliance
Antitrust laws and regulatory scrutiny (FTC review of Matterport acquisition, antitrust litigation)
MLS rules and compliance requirements for residential listings
Tax law changes and fiscal policy changes (Pillar 2 global minimum tax)
ESG disclosure requirements (California disclosure rules, EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive)
Securities laws and SEC reporting requirements
Intellectual property laws (copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret)
Data localization and cross-border data transfer restrictions
